original: a T-shirt inscribed with ‘It ain’t hard to pick up horseback ridin’ How bout I pick you up for some horsecock ridin’’

A black T-shirt with a new Texan pickup line on the front, generally used by bulls to pick up cows with as little spoken words as possible. The white text may seem vulgar on other planets, but there is no doubting its effectiveness on New Texans. This one reads: It ain’t hard to pick up horseback ridin’ How bout I pick you up for some horsecock ridin’
